81 
CLM_IP_INITL_MS_DRG_CD 
LABEL: 
Claim Inpatient Initial MS DRG Code 
DESCRIPTION: Claim inpatient Initial MS Diagnosis Related Group (DRG) Code 
SHORT NAME: CLM_IP_INITL_MS_DRG_CD 
LONG NAME: CLM_IP_INITL_MS_DRG_CD 
TYPE: 
CHAR 
LENGTH: 
4 
SOURCE: 
NCH 
VALUES: 
XXXX 
COMMENT: 
This field identifies the initial MS-DRG code assigned by MS-DRG Grouper prior to application
